From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Kellee Stewart (born April 15, 1976) is an American actress.

She grew up in Norristown, Pennsylvania and graduated from Norristown Area High School in 1993. Stewart also attended the BFA Acting Program at State University of New York at Purchase.Stewart lived in New York City, New York before moving to California. She has appeared in Law & Order: Special Victims Unit and Living With Fran as well as the 2005 movie Guess Who alongside best friend Zoe Saldana.

From 2006 to 2010 she played Stephanie Lane on the TBS sitcom My Boys. In film, she appeared in Hot Tub Time Machine (2010). She later starred in several comedy pilots, like ABC's Middle Age Rage in 2013, and well was cast in recurring role on Lifetime series Witches of East End. Also in 2013, Stewart was cast as series regular in Lifetime drama pilot HR opposite Alicia Silverstone.

Mort Mills (born Mortimer Morris Kaplan; January 11, 1919 – June 6, 1993) was an American film and television actor who had roles in over 150 movies and television episodes. He was often the town lawman or the local bad guy in many popular westerns of the 1950s and 1960s.

From 1957–1959 he had a recurring co-starring role as Marshal Frank Tallman in Man Without a Gun. Other recurring roles were as Sergeant Ben Landro in the Perry Mason series and Sheriff Fred Madden in The Big Valley. He portrayed supporting roles in the Alfred Hitchcock films Psycho (1960) and Torn Curtain (1966), and in Orson Welles' Touch of Evil (1958).

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

He was nominated for the AFI Award for Best Actor in a Leading Role in 1993, for Blackfellas, and in 1995, for The Life Of Harry Dare, and was nominated for the AFI Award for Best Actor in a Supporting Role in 1991 for Deadly. He was also nominated for the 2013 AFI Award for Open Craft Award in a Non-feature Film for his acting in the short film Cold Turkey.

Other roles include Pitch Black, Home and Away and the original stage production of Bran Nue Dae.

data.biography:
吴美珩（Ng Mei Heng, Melissa），1972年5月5日生于广东中山，1978年移民美国。

1992年参加全美华埠小姐选举获得冠军，1996年参加国际华裔小姐竞选获得亚军，加入香港无线电视成为旗下艺员。1997年，吴美衍出演TVB电视《刑事侦缉档案Ⅲ》和《鉴证实录》。2004年，在《楚汉骄雄》里饰演虞姬。2005年，主演时装剧《人间蒸发》和医疗剧《妙手仁心Ⅲ》。2006年，在《女人唔易做》里饰演女一号高志玲，该剧凭平均收视33点、最高收视41点成为全年收视冠军。
data.name: 吴美珩

data.biography:
吳美珩（Ng Mei Heng, Melissa），1972 年 5 月 5 日生於廣東中山，1978 年移民美國。

1992 年參加全美華埠小姐選舉獲得冠軍，1996 年參加國際華裔小姐競選獲得亞軍，加入香港無線電視成為旗下藝員。1997 年，吳美衍出演 TVB 電視《刑事偵緝檔案Ⅲ》和《鑑證實錄》。2004 年，在《楚漢驕雄》裏飾演虞姬。2005 年，主演時裝劇《人間蒸發》和醫療劇《妙手仁心Ⅲ》。2006 年，在《女人唔易做》裏飾演女一號高志玲，該劇憑平均收視 33 點、最高收視 41 點成為全年收視冠軍。
data.name: 吳美珩

data.biography:
Since his father was the senior physician of a ward in the Bad Schussenried Centre for Psychiatry, he grew up with his three siblings in a service flat on the former hospital grounds. He attended the Studienkolleg St.Johann Blönried and graduated from there in 2003. At the age of 17, he lived for one year on the Pine Ridge Indian Reservation, where he graduated from Red Cloud High School in 2001. In 2008 he completed his acting education at the Otto Falckenberg School in Munich.

He studied at the Hochschule für Fernsehen und Film München and graduated there in March 2018 with a diploma in documentary film directing and television journalism.

Internationally, Kranz was seen in the drama The White Ribbon (2009) by Michael Haneke, in Quentin Tarantino's war film Inglourious Basterds and in Steven Spielberg's Bridge of Spies. He became known to a wider television audience with the series Hindafing, in which he plays the city priest Kraus. The series was awarded the Austrian film prize Romy in 2018.

His spot myBorder's joyFence was awarded the First Steps Award and the Porsche Award in 2018.
data.name: Michael Kranz
Cô Gái Gặp Gỡ Những Điều Kì Lạ
data.overview: Cô gái 16 tuổi Maise Higa dành những ngày hè của mình làm việc bán thời gian tại khách sạn của gia đình cô nhưng chẳng có gì thú vị cả. Cho đến khi cô gặp Ichirou Suzuki - một cậu bé bí ẩn dường như bị ám bởi những hiện tượng siêu nhiên kỳ lạ. Khi tiếp xúc với cậu ta, Maise bất ngờ bước vào một thực tại khác, nơi những căn phòng khách sạn có thể biến thành đại dương sâu thẳm và những cây đa có thể bất ngờ mọc ra trong nhà. Maise bị hấp dẫn và đồng hành cùng Ichirou trong hành trình khám phá những bí mật đằng sau những bí ẩn không thể giải thích được xung quanh anh ta.

data.biography: Tanveer Wasim France is a British-American fashion designer, entrepreneur, and television personality. He is known as the fashion expert for the Netflix series Queer Eye, host of the web series Dressing Funny, and co-host of Next in Fashion. His memoir, Naturally Tan, was released in June 2019.
data.name: Tan France

data.biography: Satomi Akesaka (明坂 聡美, Akesaka Satomi, January 2, 1988) is a Japanese voice actress, former singer and stage actress. She is affiliated with Amuleto talent agency. She is from Saitama prefecture and has blood type B.
data.name: Satomi Akesaka

data.biography: Jordi Bosch was born on December 18, 1956 in Mataró, Barcelona, Catalonia, Spain. He is an actor, known for Majoria absoluta (2002), La sagrada família (2010) and Three Steps Above Heaven (2010). He is married to Emma Vilarasau.
data.name: Jordi Bosch

data.biography: Momoko Kôchi (March 7, 1932–November 5, 1998) was a Japanese actress, best known for her role of Emiko Yamane in Inoshiro Honda's "Gojira" (1954), and she replayed Emiko in her last film Godzilla vs. Destoroyah in 1995.
data.name: Momoko Kôchi

data.biography:
Darren Tunstall is an actor and director known for Naked (1993), Spotters (2004) and The Infinite Worlds of H.G. Wells (2001).

Darren was a professional actor, director, movement director, writer and dramaturg before becoming Lecturer in Acting at the Guildford School of Acting, University of Surrey, UK.
data.name: Darren Tunstall
